context.brief_excerpt:
**Goal:** Co-Exist privacy fix on coexist-fe. Non-leaders/participants must NOT see sensitive info on participant profile pages. Roles WITH access: asist, co-leader, leader, all staff. Roles WITHOUT: regular participants. Sensitive fields default: phone, email, emergency contact, DOB, medical notes, address (verify against the actual schema).

**Goal:** Comprehensive Co-Exist feature audit. Identify EVERY feature gap between (a) what Co-Exist needs (contract + ad-hoc Tate-relayed leader requests + meeting notes + recent bug reports + sheet/db sync requirements) and (b) what's currently shipped. Output ONE markdown file at `~/ecodiaos/drafts/coexist-feature-audit-2026-04-29.md`.

**Goal:** Codify "Claude Cowork as the 1stop shop, religiously" — add the behavioural-enforcement layer that turns the existing doctrine file into mechanical default behaviour.

Tate stated verbatim at 20:25 AEST 29 Apr 2026: "claude cowork is just the 1stop shop which you need to be religiously using." The existing pattern file `~/ecodiaos/patterns/claude-cowork-is-the-1stop-shop-for-ui-driving-tasks.md` covers WHAT and WHEN. The "religiously" framing adds the BEHAVIOURAL DEFAULT layer: the c
